title: 08-3-2 Henry Bernstein - Deposition, Erosion and Corrosion of Biomass Pyrolysis
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 15]
Here's the breakdown of the technical content:

**1. Mathematical Equations:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**2. Graphs/Charts:**

*   Axes:
    *   x-axis: Temperature (°F)
    *   y-axis: Severity of Attack
*   Curves:
    *   "Low Temperature Hot Corrosion (Type II)": A bell-shaped curve peaking around 1300 °F, starting from ~1100°F and extending to ~1500°F.
    *   "High Temperature Hot Corrosion (Type I)": A bell-shaped curve peaking around 1600 °F starting at ~1500°F.
    *   "Oxidation": An exponentially increasing curve, starting from ~1500°F and continuing beyond 1800°F.
* Key Temperature values: ~1100, ~1300, ~1500, ~1600, ~1800 (°F)

**3. Tables:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**4. Diagrams:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**5. Key Numbers, Constants, Parameters:**

*   Temperature Ranges: ~1100 °F to ~1800 °F (and beyond for Oxidation)
* Peak Corrosion Point: ~1300 °F
* Peak Corrosion Point: ~1600 °F

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**2. Graphs/Charts:**

*   **Title:**  Aluminide Coating on Mar M-246
*   **X-axis:** Sulfur in Fuel, ppm (parts per million)
*   **Y-axis:** Weight Loss, mg/cm² (milligrams per square centimeter)
*   **Curves:**
    *   80 Hours:  Approximately linear increasing curve
    *   50 Hours: Approximately linear increasing curve.
*   **Key Values**
    *   50 Hours curve
        *   1 ppm Sulfur, ~ 2 mg/cm^2 Weight loss
        *   100 ppm Sulfur, ~ 10 mg/cm^2 Weight loss
        *   600 ppm Sulfur, ~ 20 mg/cm^2 Weight loss
    *   80 Hours curve
        *   1 ppm Sulfur, ~ 5 mg/cm^2 Weight loss
        *   50 ppm Sulfur, ~ 75 mg/cm^2 Weight loss
        *   500 ppm Sulfur, ~ 120 mg/cm^2 Weight loss

**3. Tables:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**4. Diagrams:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**5. Key Numbers, Constants, Parameters:**

*   Aluminide Coating
*   Material: Mar M-246
*   Time: 50 Hours, 80 Hours
*   Sulfur in Fuel Concentration: ppm
*   Weight Loss: mg/cm²

Table: Biomass Pyrolysis Oils Properties

| Property        | Typical #2 Fuel | Switchgrass | Oakwood     | Pine  | Hawker Siddley A | Hawker Siddley B |
|-----------------|-----------------|-------------|-------------|-------|------------------|------------------|
| Sulfur, wt%     | 0.1-0.3          | 0.03-0.04   | 0.01-0.03   | ---   | 0.01             | 0.01             |
| Sulfur, ppm     | 1000-3000        | 300-400     | 100-300     | ---   | 100              | 100              |
| Alkali, ppm Na  | <0.5             | 20-40       | 10-52       | 10    | 39.5              | 74.8              |
| Alkali, ppm K   | <0.5             | 580-1380    | <10-40      | <10   | 8.0              | 4.2              |
| Alkali, ppm Ca  | <0.5             | 490-660     | 23-80       | 60    | 36.0             | 15.1             |
| Ash, wt%        | 0.01             | 0.12-0.95   | <0.05-0.05 | 0.05  | 0.1              | ---         |
| LHV, MJ/kg      | ~ 42             | 21.9-23.1   | 19.6-28.7   | 21.4  | ---   | ---        |

**4. Diagrams:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**5. Key Numbers, Constants, Parameters:**

*   Sulfur content (wt% and ppm)
*   Alkali content as Na, K, and Ca (ppm)
*   Ash content (wt%)
*   Lower Heating Value (LHV) in MJ/kg
